productDisplayName: Levis Kids Boy's Aldon White Kidswear
description: CompositionWhite bermudas made of 100% woven cotton, with strong belt loops, branded zipper with Levi's buttons, brand tag stitched to the right hip, cargo style front pockets - three on the left leg and two on the right leg - two back pockets and red stitch detailing on the pocketFitting Comfort 70 cm Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water, colour will bleed Use mild detergent Dry cleaning possible Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Dry flat inside out in shade Iron at medium setting only Iron on reverse Wash before wearing If playing is your son's favourite pastime, then this pair of white Bermudas is ideal for him. You will always find it easy to clean this pair, while your little boy is comfortable in free in them messing up and learning a lot. For that complete 'little dude' look, team it with a round neck cotton tee and footwear from crocs.
